abilities.name: Volunteer
abilities.text: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Ninetales is your Active Pokemon, you may search your deck for Ninetales or Ninetales ex, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. If you do, put 4 damage counters on Ninetales. Then, shuffle Ninetales and all cards attached to it into your deck.

tests.name: volunteer_search_deck
tests.description: Test that Volunteer searches for Ninetales or Ninetales ex

tests.name: volunteer_effect_id
tests.description: Test that effect ID is correctly formatted
